name: shadowing mass in renal collecting system
description: A mass in the renal collecting system that causes acoustic shadowing on ultrasound.

attributes.name: presence
attributes.description: Presence or absence of shadowing mass in renal collecting system

values.name: absent
values.description: Shadowing mass in renal collecting system is absent

values.name: present
values.description: Shadowing mass in renal collecting system is present

values.name: indeterminate
values.description: Presence of shadowing mass in renal collecting system cannot be determined

values.name: unknown
values.description: Presence of shadowing mass in renal collecting system is unknown

values.name: Single
values.description: One kidney stone

values.name: Multiple
values.description: Multiple kidney stones

values.name: Right kidney
values.description: Kidney stones in the right kidney

values.name: Left kidney
values.description: Kidney stones in the left kidney

values.name: Both kidneys
values.description: Kidney stones in both kidneys

values.name: <5mm
values.description: Kidney stones smaller than 5mm

values.name: 5-10mm
values.description: Kidney stones between 5mm and 10mm

values.name: >10mm
values.description: Kidney stones larger than 10mm

values.name: Present
values.description: Hydronephrosis is present

values.name: Absent
values.description: Hydronephrosis is absent

values.name: Present
values.description: Hydroureter is present

values.name: Absent
values.description: Hydroureter is absent

values.name: Present
values.description: Perinephric stranding is present

values.name: Absent
values.description: Perinephric stranding is absent

values.name: Present
values.description: Ureteral obstruction is present

values.name: Absent
values.description: Ureteral obstruction is absent

attributes.description: Whether and how a shadowing mass in renal collecting system has changed over time

values.name: unchanged
values.description: Shadowing mass in renal collecting system is unchanged

values.description: Shadowing mass in renal collecting system is stable

values.description: Shadowing mass in renal collecting system has decreased
